results.name: case_01_lagos_green
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 01 — Valid Lagos parcel (Ikorodu LGA). Expected: GREEN, LOW flood risk.

results.name: case_02_lagos_red_flood
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 02 — Lekki swamp-adjacent parcel. Expected: RED, HIGH flood risk (NDWI > 0.3, near Aga Creek).

results.name: case_03_rivers_amber
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 03 — Rivers State, Port Harcourt mainland. Expected: AMBER, MEDIUM flood risk.

results.name: case_04_niger_delta_red
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 04 — Niger Delta parcel. Expected: RED, HIGH flood risk. Strahler order >= 4, elevation < 5m, NDWI > 0.3.

results.name: case_05_swapped_easting_northing
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 05 — Swapped Easting/Northing. Raw UTM values provided with axes reversed. Expected: Dialog T2 fires, is_inside_nigeria=false BEFORE flip, flip test corrects it.

results.name: case_06_unclosed_polygon
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 06 — Unclosed polygon (missing terminal node). Expected: MCPErrorResponse POLYGON_OPEN. Pipeline must not proceed.

results.name: case_07_minna_datum
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 07 — Minna Datum input. Survey plan labelled 'Clarke 1880'. Expected: Dialog T4 fires, POS_ACCURACY flag injected, transform to WGS84 applied.

results.name: case_08_outside_nigeria
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 08 — Parcel outside Nigeria bounding box (Cameroon coordinates). Expected: Dialog T2 fires. Auto-flip test runs. Pipeline halts for user resolution.

results.name: case_09_low_crs_confidence
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 09 — CRS confidence below 60. Ambiguous numeric range. Expected: Dialog T1 fires, analysis halts until user selects CRS manually.

results.name: case_10_dms_format
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 10 — DMS format coordinate string. Expected: Dialog T5 fires, DMS converted to Decimal Degrees, user confirms conversion.

results.name: case_11_cadastral_tabular
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 11 — Cadastral Engine: Track A Tabular. 5-station Minna UTM 32N parcel (OCR text). Expected: GREEN area match, 5 ledger entries, WGS84 within Nigeria.

results.name: case_12_cadastral_cogo
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 12 — Cadastral Engine: Track B COGO Traverse. 4-leg traverse from Minna UTM tie-point. Expected: linear misclosure < 1.0m, COGO_TRAVERSE track, computed area > 0, ledger has 5 stations (anchor + 4 legs).
